Notice And Motion To Compel Deft To Produce Documents At Trial
Off Calendar Dec-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

MICHAEL G.W. LEE, Esq., (415) 788-900, Atty for plaintiff and moving party.

RULING:

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendants To Produce Documents At Trial is granted in part and denied in part.

The motion as to No. is not opposed.

The motion is denied as to No. 2.

The motion is granted as to No. 3.

The motion is granted as to Nos. 4, 5, and 6, not including contracts entered into for the defense of this matter.

The motion is granted as to Nos. 7, 15, 8, 16, 12, 13, 21, 22, and 15.

The motion is denied as to Nos. 9, 17, 18, 10, 19, 11, 20, and 14.

The motion is granted as to Nos. 23 and 24 as they redact the names of the persons who cast the ballots.

The motion is granted as to No. 25.

The motion is denied as to Nos. 26 and 27.

As to the Final Notice Nos. 1-3, the motion is denied as it calls for protected tax forms. Order was signed in open court.
COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft'S To Produce Documents At Trial, To Re-Open Discovery Concerning Said Documents, And For Sanctions For Deft'S Refusal To Comply Order Compelling Production Of Membership Records
Off Calendar Dec-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael G.W. Lee, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Edward Young
John K. Kao, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Kwun Wing Cheung

RULING AFTER HEARING: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendants To Produce Documents At Trial, To Re-Open Discovery Concerning Said Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as to Nos. 1-9 and 13-19.

The motion is granted as to Nos. 10-12, 20, 23-39, limited to the documents that constitute the requested specific documents for a five year period. The motion is denied as to No. 21 without prejudice to further motion.

The motion is denied without prejudice as to No. 21. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
